basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for JRF and Scientific Administrative Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) JRF(GATE), Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website www.iitg.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Guwahati JRF(GATE), Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in electrical or related engineering with GATE qualified, Graduate degree in any discipline
qualification.details: JRF(GATE): Bachelor's degree in electrical or related engineering with GATE qualified. Scientific Administrative Assistant: Essential: Graduate degree in any discipline. Desirable: 1. Graduate degree in computer application/Commerce 2. Experience in Microsoft office/excel and database handling.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: JRF(GATE): Bachelor's degree in electrical or related engineering with GATE qualified. Scientific Administrative Assistant: Essential: Graduate degree in any discipline. Desirable: 1. Graduate degree in computer application/Commerce 2. Experience in Microsoft office/excel and database handling.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, so there is no specific last date for application. Candidates need to attend the interview on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the JRF(GATE) and Scientific Administrative Assistant posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for JRF(GATE)?
faq.answer: For the JRF(GATE) position, a Bachelor's degree in electrical or related engineering with GATE qualification is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Scientific Administrative Assistant post is Rs. 28800.00 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, Assam, PIN-781039.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 06 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.
